data.body: INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: safeguard_approval | Fix requires editing plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (safeguard file). Three-part fix identified with high confidence: (1) add post-return continuation anchor at Phase 2 Step 2 line ~612, (2) upgrade Phase 1 Step 3b line 430 from weak blockquote to full XML ORCHESTRATOR_RESUME format, (3) add ORCHESTRATOR_RESUME blocks to 4 unprotected implementation-plan call sites (SC1 line 164, Drift Detection line 207, Step 10a line 1507, Step 13a line 1602). Root cause: Multi-Step Reasoning Drift + Silent Instruction Truncation under context pressure.
